config.enabled.name: Enable HUD
config.enabled.tooltip: Show rain-exclusive fish icons on the HUD. Disable to hide the overlay entirely.
config.hud-x.name: HUD X Position
config.hud-x.tooltip: Horizontal position of the fish icons. Negative values offset from the right edge of the screen.
config.hud-y.name: HUD Y Position
config.hud-y.tooltip: Vertical position of the fish icons (pixels from the top of the screen).
config.horizontal-layout.name: Horizontal Layout
config.horizontal-layout.tooltip: If enabled, fish icons are arranged in a horizontal row instead of a vertical column.
config.max-locations.name: Max Locations Shown
config.max-locations.tooltip: Maximum number of spawn locations shown in each tooltip. Set to 0 to show all.
